data.title: Zeigler Auto Group wins 2025 Elite Medium Business Best of the Best award in Milwaukee region from NABR.
data.description: In recognition of excellence, Zeigler Auto Group has been honored as a recipient of the 2025 Elite Medium Business Best of the Best award for the Milwaukee region by the National Association for Business Resources (NABR). Out of the notable Milwaukee's Best and Brightest Companies to Work For® awardees, NABR specifically chose Zeigler Auto Group.

data.title: Chris Heller named Chief Revenue Officer at PLACE in Bellingham, WA. Move aligns with strategy to bolster homeownership services.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 23, 2026, in Bellingham, Washington, PLACE disclosed the appointment of Chris Heller as their inaugural Chief at their integrated real estate and homeownership platform. This strategic move is set to hasten PLACE's plan to establish a cohesive and expandable homeownership system.

data.title: Correction: The news release about Consumer Product Events' Valentine's Day Gift Drop showcases trending products loved by consumers and editors.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, Consumer Product Events announced their Valentine's Day Gift Drop, setting a new benchmark for current consumer and editor preferences. The press release, distributed via PR Newswire, highlighted the latest updates from the company.

data.title: BitGo's IPO sees shares dip below offer price amid market volatility and cautious investor sentiment amidst the struggle to revive the crypto market.
data.description: The debut of the digital asset custodian has been turbulent, indicating changing investor sentiment and increased scrutiny of new listings amidst a struggle for momentum in the crypto markets.

data.title: Entera Bio to submit final EB613 Phase 3 protocol to FDA in Q1 2026, post-Dec 19th 2025 FDA ruling.
data.description: The final submission of the EB613 Phase 3 protocol to the FDA is scheduled for the first quarter of 2026. This comes after the FDA ruling on December 19, 2025. The submission is a crucial step in the approval process for EB613, with significant implications for the future of this drug. The timeline indicates a focus on compliance and readiness for regulatory review, potentially leading to the commercialization of EB613 in the near future. Stay tuned for further updates as the process unfolds.

data.title: Activate Energy Acquisition Corp. plans separate trading of Class A shares & warrants from January 26, 2026.
data.description: Activate Energy Acquisition Corp. has revealed that its Class A Ordinary Shares and Warrants will commence separate trading on January 26, 2026. This event allows shareholders to trade these securities individually, giving them more flexibility in managing their investments. This move is expected to benefit shareholders as they can now trade the Class A Ordinary Shares and Warrants independently in the market.
Moomoo's expanding retail access to BitGo IPO with widespread subscriber participation. #finance #investment

data.title: Luxury home collection by Toll Brothers coming to Milton, GA with expansive homes on 1+ acre sites and premier amenities.
data.description: The Bridlefield - Reserve Collection is set to present spacious homes situated on home sites of over one acre, boasting top-notch amenities.

data.title: StudioNorth and MarketLauncher have released a benchmark study on AI readiness in B2B growth, involving 60+ organizations.
data.description: Chicago-based StudioNorth, in collaboration with MarketLauncher, has unveiled the AI Readiness Report 2025-2026, a comprehensive analysis delving into the usage of artificial intelligence by B2B marketing and revenue executives. The study encompasses input from senior leaders in over 60 B2B companies in sectors such as technology, healthcare, finance, manufacturing, and professional services. Findings revealed the challenges faced by organizations in effectively implementing AI for scalability and growth.

data.title: Meta (NASDAQ: META) sees 5% jump as it leverages Threads for ad revenue, aiming for incremental growth and extended engagement.
data.description: META (NASDAQ: META) saw a significant increase of around 5% following the announcement of early progress in monetizing Threads. Threads is being positioned as an additional ad surface for Meta's data and targeting engine, aiming for scalability. The focus is on building engagement first before efficient monetization. The approach highlights incremental growth rather than a costly pivot, with Threads intended to extend time spent and reach of advertisers for Meta. The market reaction was more about the potential options this provides rather than immediate revenue impact. This strategy mirrors previous successful plays by Meta.

data.title: Live Oak Bancshares stock's RS Rating jumps from 79 to 85, showing improving price performance.
data.description: Live Oak Bancshares has demonstrated positive price performance, resulting in its IBD Relative Strength Rating rising from 79 to 85. This increase indicates improving market strength for the company.

data.title: USA Rare Earth's stock shows a surge in Relative Strength Rating, reaching 91, a high level in the elite category.
data.description: USA Rare Earth has achieved a significant milestone with its Relative Strength Rating soaring to an exceptional level of 91, indicating strong performance compared to other stocks. This increase signifies a positive trend for the company and has garnered attention from investors.

data.title: CD Valet released no-penalty CD rates to help consumers find high-yield options nationally in an ambiguous market.
data.description: A digital marketplace called CD Valet based in Seattle was established in January 2026. This platform assists consumers in finding top verified CD rates across the United States. It aids community financial institutions in attracting new deposits efficiently. CD Valet unveiled various no-penalty CD rates today for customers to benefit from.

data.title: Blend360 named to 2026 AI-First Service Firms List, recognized for leadership in AI at Davos.
data.description: In a recent announcement made at the Davos conference, Blend360, a prominent Global AI Services firm based in New York, has been recognized for its outstanding leadership in offering decision automation at scale through artificial intelligence. This recognition came as Blend360 was named in Constellation Research's prestigious list of 2026 AI-First Service Firms. This achievement underscores Blend360's commitment to enhancing the capabilities of AI technology and signifies its position as a frontrunner in the industry.

data.title: Pfizer CEO criticizes RFK's vaccine views as anti-science, calls for US health leadership change. Bourla warns US falling behind China in health research.
data.description: Pfizer Inc.'s CEO, Albert Bourla, openly criticized Robert F. Kennedy for his anti-vaccine views, deeming them as "anti-science." Bourla emphasized the need for a change in leadership at the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services to make significant progress in immunization policies. During a Wall Street Journal event at the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, Bourla stated that discussions with Kennedy always reached an impasse when vaccines were the topic, despite other healthcare exchanges being productive. He mentioned that talks on cancer research and pharmaceutical pricing were fruitful, contrasting starkly with the challenging nature of vaccine-related conversations. Bourla characterized Kennedy's perspective as inflexible and ideological, presenting it more as a belief system rather than a scientific discussion. The CEO's remarks were made during a Wednesday event and full coverage can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Shell is expanding in Nigeria with Bonga projects, potentially spending $20 billion, including $10 billion on Bonga South-West.
data.description: Shell PLC shares (NYSE: SHEL) saw an increase as NNPC Group CEO Bashir Ojulari mentioned the company's plan to invest up to $20 billion in Nigeria's oil and gas sector. Ojulari also discussed ongoing talks regarding the Bonga South-West project, which could involve about $10 billion in capital spending and substantial operating expenditure throughout its lifespan. Shell recently made a final investment decision of around $5 billion on the Bonga project.

data.title: Metropolitan Floors introduces RIFT, the latest Couture Collection, featuring white oak in straight lay, chevron, and parquet.
data.description: Kentwood Floors, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, has introduced a new product named RIFT as part of the Couture Collection. RIFT features rift-sawn white oak available in straight lay and chevron patterns, with parquet design set to be launched this spring.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures drop as Trump prepares Davos speech post Greenland sell-off; Netflix suffers plunge after earnings.
data.description: After the S&P 500 and Nasdaq dropped due to Trump's Greenland threats, he is set to speak at Davos. Netflix also suffered a decline in earnings. Dow Jones Futures are falling ahead of Trump's speech in Davos following the Greenland sell-off, with Netflix experiencing a significant plunge.

data.title: Supreme Court cautious on affecting Fed independence in current case; live updates available.
data.description: The independence of the Federal Reserve is being threatened in an ongoing case. The Supreme Court is currently showing caution in order to avoid any harm to the Federal Reserve's autonomy.

data.title: Opna Bio's OPN-2853 (Zavabresib) granted Orphan Drug Designation for myelofibrosis by FDA, a BET inhibitor.
data.description: In South San Francisco, Opna Bio, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in oncology therapeutics, has revealed that its Bet small molecule inhibitor, OPN-2853, has received Orphan Drug Designation from the FDA for the management of myelofibrosis. The generic name "zavabresib" has also been accepted internationally. This designation provides various benefits to assist in the development and commercialization of OPN-2853 for treating myelofibrosis, a condition affecting a specific number of people in the US.
